(Rasmus Andersson and contributors)

License

This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1.

A copy of the license is included below.
You can also read the official license and FAQ here:

https://scripts.sil.org/OFL

---

SIL OPEN FONT LICENSE

Version 1.1 — 26 February 2007

---

Preamble

The goals of the Open Font License (OFL) are to:

- Encourage global collaboration in font development
- Support font creation efforts by academic and linguistic communities
- Provide a free and open framework for sharing and improving fonts

The OFL allows fonts to be:

- Used
- Studied
- Modified
- Redistributed

as long as they are not sold individually.

Fonts and derivative works may be bundled, embedded, redistributed, or sold as part of software, provided that reserved font names are not used by modified versions.

Derivative fonts must remain under the same license (OFL).

---

Definitions

Font Software
The set of files released under this license, including source files, build scripts, and documentation.

Reserved Font Name
Names specified by the copyright holders as reserved.

Original Version
The official font files distributed by the copyright holders.

Modified Version
Any derivative created by modifying, adding, removing, or porting components of the original font software.

Author
Any designer, developer, engineer, or contributor involved in the creation of the font software.

---

Permission and Conditions

Permission is granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of the Font Software to:

- Use
- Study
- Copy
- Merge
- Embed
- Modify
- Redistribute

subject to the following conditions:

1. The Font Software may not be sold individually.

2. Original or modified versions may be bundled or distributed with software, provided that the copyright notice and this license are included.

3. Modified versions may not use Reserved Font Names unless explicit written permission is granted.

4. The names of the copyright holders or authors must not be used to promote or advertise derivative versions without permission.

5. The Font Software must remain under the SIL Open Font License and cannot be released under another license.

---

Termination

This license becomes null and void if any of the above conditions are violated.

---

Disclaimer

THE FONT SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND.

This includes but is not limited to:

- Merchantability
- Fitness for a particular purpose
- Non-infringement of intellectual property rights

The copyright holders shall not be liable for any damages or claims arising from the use of this font software.
